prestazioni: Engine: 3.5L twin-turbo Lambda II RS T-GDi (engine code: G6DS) with a custom ECU flash from Unichip Q4+ for precise fuel and ignition mapping, targeting 450whp and 480lb-ft torque on 93 octane with a 22psi peak boost level, utilizing a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel and 0.82 A/R turbine housing for optimized spool and top-end flow

Full 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust system from Armytrix Valvetronic with 409 stainless steel mandrel-bent piping, 200-cell catalytic converters, and electronically controlled butterfly valves for adjustable backpressure and sound tuning, paired with a custom X-Force muffler for aggressive yet refined tone

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part #DFV003) with 30-way adjustable damping, 20mm front and 15mm rear ride height adjustment, and Swift Springs (14kg/mm front, 12kg/mm rear) for optimized cornering balance, complemented by a Cusco front strut tower bar (part #802 350 A) and rear upper strut brace (part #802 351 A) to reduce chassis flex
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (GV70-specific, part #LB-GV70-01) with extended fenders, custom carbon fiber side skirts, and aggressive front/rear bumpers, finished in a custom matte Hyper Blue with gloss black accents and clear bra film (XPEL Ultimate Plus) on high-impact areas

Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (GV70-specific, part #RB-GV70-V3) featuring a carbon fiber GT-style rear wing with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees) and integrated third brake light, paired with a custom front splitter with air curtains and canards for improved downforce and cooling airflow management

Enkei NT03+MM wheels (20x10.5 +25 front, 20x11 +35 rear) in Hyper Silver with custom red pinstripes, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear) for maximum grip, complemented by Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 400mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for fade-resistant stopping power
